mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_config (id, config_key, config_value, is_global, project_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{isGlobal}, #{projectId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: UPDATE ai_config SET status = 'deleted', update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, config_key as configKey, config_value as configValue, is_global as isGlobal, project_id as projectId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_config WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'active'

SELECT id, config_key as configKey, config_value as configValue, is_global as isGlobal, project_id as projectId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_config WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND status = 'active'

SELECT id, config_key as configKey, config_value as configValue, is_global as isGlobal, project_id as projectId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_config WHERE is_global = 1 AND status = 'active'

SELECT id, config_key as configKey, config_value as configValue, is_global as isGlobal, project_id as projectId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND status = 'active'
